title: Web Funnel Screenshot Crawler
description: Crawls web funnels (quizzes, signups, ecommerce, lead gen) by clicking through all options, screenshotting every step, and mapping all possible paths.

startUrl.title: Start URL
startUrl.description: The first page of the funnel to crawl

maxDepth.title: Max Depth
maxDepth.description: Maximum number of click steps before stopping a path

maxBranches.title: Max Branches
maxBranches.description: Maximum number of clickable options to follow per page

waitAfterClick.title: Wait After Click (ms)
waitAfterClick.description: Milliseconds to wait after each click before screenshotting

viewportWidth.title: Viewport Width
viewportWidth.description: Browser viewport width in pixels (default: mobile)

viewportHeight.title: Viewport Height
viewportHeight.description: Browser viewport height in pixels (default: mobile)

anthropicApiKey.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropicApiKey.description: API key for Claude LLM analysis. Can also be set as ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var.

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: URL to POST screenshot results to when the run finishes. Can also be set as WEBHOOK_URL env var.

webhookSecret.title: Webhook Secret
webhookSecret.description: Secret sent as X-Webhook-Secret header with the webhook POST. Can also be set as WEBHOOK_SECRET env var.

runId.title: Run ID
runId.description: Unique identifier echoed back in the webhook payload so the caller can correlate results. Auto-generated (UUID) if not provided. Can also be set as RUN_ID env var.
